nasb.text: Moreover, the Lord will raise up for Himself a king over Israel who will cut off the house of Jeroboam this day and from now on.

esv.text: Moreover, the Lord will raise up for himself a king over Israel who shall cut off the house of Jeroboam today. And henceforth,

cnv.text: 耶和華必為自己興起一個王治理以色列，他必剪除耶羅波安家，今天就是時候了，就是現在！

ccb.text: 耶和华必为自己立一位君王统治以色列，他必铲除耶罗波安家。现在就是时候了。
